data.title: Asahi Kasei's Microza® membrane division earns Gold rating in EcoVadis sustainability assessment.
data.description: Asahi Kasei, a global company with locations in Tokyo, Novi, and Düsseldorf, has disclosed that its Microza & Water Processing Division achieved a Gold rating in the EcoVadis sustainability evaluation. This recognition underscores the division's commitment to sustainability practices and highlights its exemplary performance in this regard.

data.title: Blackjack Natural Resources receives equity commitment from Pearl Energy Investments for new oil and gas venture in Oklahoma City.
data.description: A new upstream oil and gas company, Blackjack Natural Resources, LLC, based in Oklahoma City, has received an equity commitment from Pearl Energy Investments and the Company's management team. Headed by Jeff Wampler and Andrew Haraway as Co-CEOs, Blackjack will concentrate on upstream investment opportunities in the greater Mid-Continent region. This commitment marks a significant step in Blackjack's journey as they enter the market with strong financial backing.

data.title: Bonsai receives $1.8M for marketing intelligence platform, simplifying measurement chaos for brands.
data.description: In a groundbreaking development, a new platform has been launched in Chicago on July 17, 2025. The platform, named Bonsai, is the first of its kind and aims to bring clarity and improved return on investment for brands struggling with marketing measurement challenges. Bonsai is a first-party marketing intelligence tool that streamlines the process and drives profitable growth for businesses. In a recent announcement, it was revealed that the platform has secured a significant investment of $1.8 million. This innovative solution is set to revolutionize the way brands approach marketing strategies and spending by providing automation and data-driven insights.

data.title: Peterson Health selects Medaptus Charge Pro to capture missing charges, enhancing revenue. Software integrates with Athena Health and Meditech EHR.
data.description: Medaptus is excited to announce the integration of their Charge Pro Software with Athena Health and Meditech EHR systems in Boston on July 17, 2025. This integration will enable the automated capture of all missing charges, eliminating the need for manual work and increasing efficiency for healthcare providers. Medaptus, a top healthcare technology solutions provider, aims to streamline operations and improve accuracy in charge capture through this collaboration.

data.title: TNL Mediagene launches new crowdfunding package leveraging 45+ million readers & e-commerce expertise in Japan.
data.description: TNL Mediagene has recently introduced a comprehensive crowdfunding service in Japan, consolidating its various strengths in advertising, e-commerce, and Digital Studio infrastructure. This new service aims to boost crowdfunding campaign results for entrepreneurs by utilizing the company's wide media presence.

data.title: BTCT shifts focus to Ethereum, converting all Bitcoin reserves into ETH, as announced on July 17, 2025. NASDAQ: BTCT.
data.description: On July 17, 2025, in Singapore, BTC Digital Ltd. (NASDAQ: BTCT), a prominent blockchain technology firm, declared a significant change in strategy by adopting Ethereum (ETH) as its primary asset and operational base. This move marks a notable shift in the company's approach towards digital assets.

data.title: BitMine Immersion now holds over $1 billion of Ethereum, exceeding initial PIPE proceeds by 300%. Holding over 300,000 ETH1 to strengthen Ethereum ecosystem.
data.description: A company currently holds around $1 billion worth of ETH1, which is more than 300% higher than the initial $250 million raised through PIPE. The company's ETH1 holdings surpass 300,000. Their strategy for the Ethereum treasury aims to enhance the broader Ethereum ecosystem. This information was announced in Las Vegas on July 17, 2025.

data.title: Hong Kong's Intelligent Group (Nasdaq: INTJ) transforms to lead in "Web3 Services + Digital Assets," setting new digital economy standards.
data.description: On July 17, 2025, in Hong Kong, Intelligent Group Limited (Nasdaq: INTJ), a financial public relations company, announced its strategic shift towards leading an integrated "Web3 Services + Digital Assets" ecosystem. This move signals a significant development in the digital economy landscape.

data.title: New mining model aims for speed, scale, profit over traditional high-risk exploration. Slim one-in-a-thousand success rate.
data.description: In recent editorial coverage, it has been highlighted that the mining industry has long been fixated on high-risk, capital-intensive exploration. The chances of success in this field have been noted as slim, with only about one in a thousand discoveries proving to be viable for operation. This emphasizes the significant challenges faced by companies operating in this sector.
